title: Interaction Policy
description: Canonical persona interaction policy profile used to resolve agent behavior across stored, session, and default sources.

control.description: Preferred control mode for the agent/user interaction.

expertise.description: Best-known user expertise band for instruction tuning.

pace.description: Preferred delivery pace for the current interaction.

source.description: Where the resolved profile came from.

confidence.description: Resolver confidence in the returned profile, normalized to [0, 1].

schema_version.description: Stable schema label for the interaction-policy profile.
